assessment.note: Remote work is making meeting context harder to read, which is a strong clarity gap around implicit cues and commitments.

new_queue.label: Remote context gap
new_queue.name: Being remote — what context do you miss most in those meetings?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific missing cues that make commitments and ownership harder to read.

new_queue.label: First friction
new_queue.name: What is still slowing you down when priorities conflict?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the specific friction point that is hardest to move through right now.

new_queue.label: Consensus drag
new_queue.name: What part of alignment is creating the most extra cycle for you?
new_queue.description: Finds where consensus-seeking is slowing execution or adding noise.

new_queue.label: Steadier next steps
new_queue.name: What support from me would make the next two weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the discussion into concrete support and next-step commitment.
